code:
import io
import string
import list

fn join_ints(_ nums: List<Int>) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums.len()
    let n = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x) x
    when None 0
    end
    if i == 0
      result = "#{n}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{n}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut evens: List<Int> = []
  mut odds: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s) s
    when None ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(x) x
    when None 0
    end
    if n % 2 == 0
      evens = list.push(evens, n)
    else
      odds = list.push(odds, n)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("evens=#{join_ints(evens)}")
  print("odds=#{join_ints(odds)}")
end
